title: echites edulis
intro: Echites edulis, also known as the Coral Bean or Butterfly Pea, is a plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Echites edulis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having potential neuroprotective effects. Echites edulis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues.
